original:
"I propose you contact Menes directly. If you show interest in his pursuits, I believe he will be well-disposed toward someone of your... repute. He could provide us with information to plan our next move."

Bornanew shuts his notebook.
"Your repute. As you well know," he says rather definitively. "And so will Menes."

"I propose you contact Menes directly. If you show interest in his pursuits, I believe he will be well-disposed toward someone of your... repute. He could provide us with information to plan our next move."

Bornanew shuts his notebook.

option_line: BFFI_onBoardEndPLhostile2:"Just one problem- the League wants me shot on sight."
original: Just one problem- the League wants me shot on sight.

Bornanew opens his notebook.

He stands for a moment, eyes closed. "It is not ideal," he says.

"You will have to approach Olinadu with your transponder off. But I believe Menes will consider your official outsider status... interesting. Adventurous. It might even provide a sense of 'roguish charm'."
He meets your look. "I know," he says with a hint of smile.
He meets your look. "You have my faith," he says with a hint of smile.
